html:
Indicator API

Your script runs in a sandboxed context. Use the bars array and return series data to plot on the chart. Plotted values are exported with the chart.

Available

  • bars — array of {time, open, high, low, close, volume}
  • plot(label, data, opts?) — draw a line series. data is [{time, value, color?}]. Per-point color overrides the series color for that segment.
  • plotHist(label, data, opts?) — draw a histogram. Each point may include a color field to override the bar color.
  • plotBand(label, upper, lower, opts?) — draw a band between two lines
  • plotDot(label, data, opts?) — draw points / particles
  • plotArea(label, data, opts?) — draw a filled area
  • plotCandle(label, candles, opts?) — draw synthetic candles
  • plotLabel(label, data, opts?) — draw text or value annotations on the chart at specific price levels. data is [{time, value, text, color?, position?, shape?, size?}]
  • buy(time, price?) — record a long entry
  • sell(time, price?) — record an exit

plot() / plotHist() opts

{ color: '#hex', lineWidth: 1|2|3, lineStyle: 0|1|2, pane: 0|1 }

plotLabel() opts

{
  color: '#hex',        // default marker color (overridable per point)
  position: 'aboveBar'  // 'aboveBar' | 'belowBar' | 'inBar'
  shape: 'circle',      // 'circle' | 'square' | 'arrowUp' | 'arrowDown'
  size: 1,              // marker size multiplier
  pane: 0               // which pane to draw on
}

Each data point in plotLabel can override color, position, shape, and size individually.

Example — Color-changing line (trend direction)

const period = 20;
const data = bars.slice(period).map((b, i) => {
  const slice = bars.slice(i, i + period);
  const avg = slice.reduce((s, c) => s + c.close, 0) / period;
  const rising = i > 0 && avg > bars.slice(i - 1, i + period - 1).reduce((s, c) => s + c.close, 0) / period;
  return { time: b.time, value: avg, color: rising ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444' };
});
plot('SMA20 Colored', data, { color: '#a78bfa' });

Example — Color-changing histogram (MACD)

const fast = 12, slow = 26, sig = 9;
const ema = (arr, p) => {
  const k = 2 / (p + 1);
  return arr.reduce((acc, v, i) => {
    acc.push(i === 0 ? v : v * k + acc[acc.length - 1] * (1 - k));
    return acc;
  }, []);
};
const closes = bars.map(b => b.close);
const macdLine = ema(closes, fast).map((v, i) => v - ema(closes, slow)[i]);
const signal = ema(macdLine.slice(slow - 1), sig);
const hist = signal.map((sv, i) => {
  const mv = macdLine[slow - 1 + i];
  const diff = mv - sv;
  return { time: bars[slow - 1 + i].time, value: diff, color: diff >= 0 ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444' };
});
plotHist('MACD Hist', hist);

Example — plotLabel (signal annotations)

const labels = bars.map((b, i) => {
  if (i === 0) return null;
  const pct = ((b.close - bars[i - 1].close) / bars[i - 1].close * 100);
  if (Math.abs(pct) < 1.5) return null;
  return {
    time: b.time,
    value: b.close,
    text: pct.toFixed(1) + '%',
    color: pct > 0 ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444',
    position: pct > 0 ? 'aboveBar' : 'belowBar',
    shape: pct > 0 ? 'arrowUp' : 'arrowDown'
  };
}).filter(Boolean);
plotLabel('Moves', labels, { size: 1 });

Example — plotLabel (value readout on sub-pane)

const period = 14;
let gains = 0, losses = 0;
for (let i = 1; i <= period; i++) {
  const d = bars[i].close - bars[i - 1].close;
  d >= 0 ? (gains += d) : (losses -= d);
}
let avgG = gains / period, avgL = losses / period;
const rsi = [], rsiLabels = [];
for (let i = period + 1; i < bars.length; i++) {
  const d = bars[i].close - bars[i - 1].close;
  avgG = (avgG * (period - 1) + Math.max(d, 0)) / period;
  avgL = (avgL * (period - 1) + Math.max(-d, 0)) / period;
  const val = avgL === 0 ? 100 : 100 - 100 / (1 + avgG / avgL);
  rsi.push({ time: bars[i].time, value: val });
  if (i % 10 === 0) rsiLabels.push({
    time: bars[i].time, value: val,
    text: val.toFixed(0),
    color: val > 70 ? '#ef4444' : val < 30 ? '#22c55e' : '#94a3b8',
    position: 'inBar'
  });
}
plotHist('RSI14', rsi, { color: '#3b82f6', pane: 1 });
plotLabel('RSI Values', rsiLabels, { pane: 1 });

Example — SMA

const period = 20;
const sma = bars.slice(period - 1).map((b, i) => {
  const slice = bars.slice(i, i + period);
  const avg = slice.reduce((s, c) => s + c.close, 0) / period;
  return { time: b.time, value: avg };
});
plot('SMA20', sma, { color: '#f59e0b', lineWidth: 2 });

Example — Dots

const dots = bars.map((b, i) => ({
  time: b.time,
  value: i ? (b.close > bars[i - 1].close ? 1 : -1) : 0
}));
plotDot('Signals', dots, { color: '#22c55e' });

Example — Area

const area = bars.map((b, i) => ({
  time: b.time,
  value: i ? b.close - bars[i - 1].close : 0
}));
plotArea('Delta', area, { color: '#a78bfa' });

Example — Candles

const synthetic = bars.slice(1).map((b, i) => ({
  time: b.time,
  open: bars[i].close,
  high: Math.max(b.high, bars[i].close),
  low: Math.min(b.low, bars[i].close),
  close: b.close
}));
plotCandle('Synthetic', synthetic);

Example — Strategy

bars.forEach((b,i)=>{
  if(i===0) return;
  if(b.close < bars[i - 1].close) buy(b.time);
  if(b.close > bars[i - 1].close) sell(b.time);
});
